column1: # §B4 sectioning golden — the exact search-section set of the two EDITORIALLY FROZEN fixture
# pages (guides/deploy-guide.md, index.md; same frozen inputs as the PB-REST-1 goldens).
#   - heading_path       = breadcrumb texts joined with "|" (ancestors first, own text last);
#   - body               = plain section text; newlines escaped as \u{A} (GoldenTsv unescapes)
# Regeneration discipline (Phase-1 fixture rules): these rows change ONLY with a deliberate,
# reviewed edit of the fixture file or of the §B4 section policy itself. Regenerate by running
# SectionSplitter over an IndexHarness rebuild of fixtures/demo-docs and transcribing the output
# — then REVIEW each body against the fixture Markdown by eye before committing (no blind dump).
